purpose: Machine-readable Codex-owned schema for visible Wizard voice, lane, council, and follow-up receipt rows.

lane.description: Stable visible voice, lane, council, or follow-up option name.

emoji.description: Stable emoji for the visible lane when one exists; empty string only for non-emoji system rows.

worker_id.description: Runtime worker id for spawned/shutdown rows; null for blocked/deferred rows.

rules: Visible lanes require a row before they can be claimed as run.
Worker count is not proof of plurality; distinct task cards and receipts are required.
A blocked or deferred row is valid receipt truth when runtime, channel, explicit scope, or safety constraints prevent spawning.
Follow-up options are proposed prompts unless Wave 6 has a receipt row for the option.
LLM Council is a layer and must not be conflated with the voice rows it adjudicates.
